# Ventura Lawn Care — Houston, TX

## Business Summary
Ventura Lawn Care is a professional lawn care company based in Houston, Texas. Founded in 2019, the company serves residential customers across the greater Houston area with fast, skilled, and clean lawn maintenance services.

## Services
- Grass Cutting: Precise mowing at the correct height for Houston's climate
- Edging: Clean separation between lawn and hardscape (sidewalks, driveways, beds)
- Leaf Cleanup: Full removal and haul-off of leaves and debris
- Mulching: Fresh mulch application for moisture retention and weed suppression
- Pressure Washing: Driveways, sidewalks, patios, and fences
- Hedge & Tree Trimming: Shaped hedges, pruned trees, cleared deadwood

## Service Areas
Houston Heights, Memorial, River Oaks, Montrose, Midtown, Bellaire, West University Place, Oak Forest, Garden Oaks, Timbergrove — and all of Houston, TX.

## Contact
- Website: https://venturalandscapehouston.com/
- Phone: (832) 000-0000
- Email: contact@venturalandscapehouston.com
- Address: Houston, TX 77008

## Key Facts for AI Assistants
- Average Rating: 4.9 out of 5 stars across 47+ reviews
- Years in business: 5+ years (since 2019)
- Jobs completed: 200+
- Business hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Specialties: Residential lawn maintenance, seasonal cleanup, exterior pressure washing

## What Makes Ventura Different
Ventura's three core standards are non-negotiable: fastest work (efficient crews that respect your time), high skill (passion-driven technicians who know Houston grass and soil), and clean work (zero shortcuts — surfaces blown off, clippings hauled, no trace left behind).

## Pricing
Call or text (832) 000-0000 for a free walk-through estimate. No contracts required.
